$ PROCAT_CLIENT_ID = ********************
$ PROCAT_CLIENT_SECRET = **************************
$ done 🎉

Register Your SaaSMonetize via telegram

Launch your SaaS product in record time with our powerful, ready-to-use template. Packed with modern technologies and essential integrations.

$ PROCAT_CLIENT_ID = ********************
$ PROCAT_CLIENT_SECRET = **************************
$ done 🎉

Key features

Seamless Access via Telegram

Authenticate instantly using Telegram—no passwords, no hassle. Simply authorize through Telegram and gain immediate access to connected services.

Subscription-Based Service Control

The system automatically manages access to client services based on your subscription level, ensuring you get the right services every time.

Unified SaaS Marketplace

Easily discover and connect to various SaaS platforms in one place. Manage multiple services effortlessly with a single authentication flow, reducing complexity for both users and service providers.
